meaning: n.梳者,[纺]梳机,<美>卷浪,拍岸浪
examples: High card sliver U % and comber sliver U %.
Comber movement is the most important working step of Nipper Mechanism.
Comber: One, such as a machine or a worker, that combs wool, for example.
Mrs Ruddle passed away at her Peterborough nursing home on Boxing Day, her daughter Pat Comber said.
Mr Strickland, 36, was found shot dead in a car on Quarry Road near Comber on 11 January.
